blocks.aiPurpose: Cloud-themed hero section with gradient background, headline, subtitle, and primary CTA button. Designed for SaaS awareness funnel top.
Grid of feature cards with icons and short descriptions. Each card highlights a key capability or benefit of the cloud service.
Alternating text-and-image blocks that explain business benefits. Left-text/right-image and right-text/left-image pattern for visual rhythm.
Grid of integration partner logos or supported platforms with brief labels. Demonstrates ecosystem compatibility.
Map placeholder with global presence claim. Static image reference with caption about data center or office locations.
Customer testimonial cards with quotes, names, titles, and company logos. Provides social proof for the cloud product.
Counter/animated statistics strip showing uptime percentage, active users, data processed, and other metrics.
Call-to-action section at page bottom. Gradient background with headline, supporting text, and primary button. Connects user to trial or purchase.
